title: Jazmine's Bingo Night
location: Chicken N Pickle, 9330 W Hanna Ln, Glendale, AZ 85305
description: 🎉 Cost: $10 gets you a bingo card to play all 5 rounds. That’s 5 chances to win amazing prizes!
All proceeds support Jazmine’s Journey and our mission to help families impacted by pediatric cancer. Bring your friends and family for a night of fun, prizes, and making a difference!
We can’t wait to see you there! 💛

title: Smashburger Giveback Day
location: Smashburger at 3121 W Peoria Ave Phoenix, AZ
description: We are so excited for you to join us for Smashburger's Giveback Day! Smashburger is donating back 20% to Jazmine's Journey!
These funds help families impacted by childhood cancer! Your lunch or dinner can make a difference!
We can’t wait to see you there! 💛
listItems: Wear your Jazmine’s Journey shirt or colors 💛

title: UNO Tournament
location: Chicken N Pickle, 9330 W Hanna Ln, Glendale, AZ 85305
description: Get ready for a fun-filled afternoon of strategy, smiles, and support at our First UNO Tournament benefiting pediatric cancer families!
Tournament format: Every player competes in 3 rounds of UNO with rotating players. Top 4 scorers advance to the Championship Round.
Awards for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd place!
Entry Fee: $30 (includes a soda). Funds raised support bill payment assistance for families affected by pediatric cancer.
BONUS: Bring an unwrapped toy or gift card and receive a raffle ticket—donations go to children currently undergoing cancer treatment.
Come play for a purpose and help us make a difference one card at a time!
listItems: Register now to secure your seat at the table!

title: Ayla Hope Golf Tournament
postTitle: 🏌️ Tee Up for Ayla Hope with Jazmine’s Journey: A Fight Against Childhood Cancer
location: Toka Sticks Golf Club, 6910 E Williams Field Rd, Mesa, AZ 85212
description: Join us for a day of golf with purpose—supporting Ayla Hope and her family.
Entry Fee: $150 per golfer (includes green fee, cart, and lunch).
Contests & Prizes: Hole-in-One, Longest Drive Challenge, 1st–3rd place awards, and raffle drawings!
By participating, you’ll help ease the financial burden on Ayla’s family. Under “Add a donation for Jazmine's Journey,” any additional funds go directly to Ayla’s family.
For questions or sponsorship opportunities: info@jazminesjourney.com

title: Bingo Night
location: Chicken N Pickle, 9330 W Hanna Ln, Glendale, AZ 85305

All proceeds support Jazmine’s Journey and our mission to help families impacted by pediatric cancer. Bring your friends and family for a night of fun, prizes, and making a difference!

title: Jazmine’s Hike
postTitle: Jazmine’s Hike: Her Unseen Journey to Cure Pediatric Cancer
location: North Mountain Visitor Center, 12950 N 7th St, Phoenix, AZ 85022
description: We’re taking the steps Jazmine couldn’t—raising funds for Steele Children’s Cancer Research with 100% of proceeds donated.
Registration: $20 per participant.
Enjoy complimentary coffee thanks to Serafina Coffee Roasters!

Disclaimer: Participants acknowledge they are voluntarily taking part and assume all risks. Jazmine’s Journey and organizers are not responsible for injuries, accidents, or lost items. No refunds; all fees are considered a donation.
listItems: Learn more about Steele Children’s Research Center: https://peds.arizona.edu/research

title: Rock Painting
location: Chicken N Pickle, 9330 W Hanna Ln, Glendale, AZ 85305
description: Join us for a fun and creative Rock Painting event to support Jazmine’s Journey (501(c)(3)).
Cost: $10 per person — includes access to painting supplies (for use during the event) and rocks to decorate and take home.
Let your creativity shine while supporting families affected by pediatric cancer.
Supplies are provided for use at the event and are not for keeping.

title: Birthday Bash Pickleball Tournament
postTitle: Jazmine’s Journey Second Annual Birthday Bash Pickleball Tournament
location: Chicken N Pickle, 9330 W Hanna Ln, Glendale, AZ 85305
description: Join us for an exciting evening of pickleball, fun, and giving back!
Tournament: $30 per person (register as a team of two). Limited to 24 teams—secure your spot!
Team name must be sent to info@jazminesjourney.com.
Additional activities: Silent Auction, Vendor Opportunities (4 spots, $60 each—no food, drinks, or weapons; pre-approval required), and a Toy Raffle (bring a new, unwrapped toy for a raffle ticket).
Special Guest: Ariel Franz will sing the National Anthem.
Click the registration link to learn about Sponsorship and Volunteer opportunities.
